content.mediaBody: The post includes the exact setup checkpoints and guardrails.

media.alt: Social card for the Open Harness demo guide: A repeatable sandbox for coding agents, with install, attach, authenticate, isolate worktrees, and open first PR steps.

reviewChecklist: Headline is grounded in the post and avoids inflated claims.
Proof path matches the blog body and is useful to the target reader.
Screenshot is from the post assets and contains no secrets, tokens, or unwanted UI.
CTA asks for feedback from the intended audience.
Rendered JPG is 1200×675 and suitable for LinkedIn/X link-adjacent posts.
